author: IS4n-NjYw-close-inherited-file-descriptors-fd-3-at-crossbridge
content: Completed #46: crossbridge-server closes all inherited fds >= 3 via close_inherited_fds() as the first statement of main(), using close_range(2) with a /proc/self/fd ENOSYS fallback; fds 0/1/2 left intact; systemd socket-activation caveat documented in the doc comment. libc added as a direct (workspace) dependency. New integration test tests/inherited_fds.rs spawns the real binary with an inherited pipe and asserts EOF while the server is still alive. Committed as 593c54e. crossbridge-server: 40 tests + new test pass, pedantic clippy clean, fmt clean for changed files. CAVEATS: (1) pre-existing rustfmt violation at crossbridge-server/src/slug.rs:184 from #45 left untouched (out of scope, likely rustfmt-version skew); (2) 4 pre-existing crossbridge-client/tests/end_to_end.rs failures in this sandbox, unrelated to #46 (Cargo.lock diff proves crossbridge-client dep graph unchanged); (3) had to run 'git worktree prune' to clear a stale .crosslink/.hub-cache registration that was blocking crosslink sync.
